vmCoverage.note: Discovery registry support only unless listed live.
Solana native SOL and SPL token send/receive are wired.
EVM native coin and ERC-20 send/receive are wired.
Native UTXO send/receive is wired for selected chains only.
TRON, XRP Ledger, TON, Algorand, Stellar, MultiversX, NEO, and selected EVM-account networks are wired; other account-model chains still need adapters.
Sui and Aptos native send/receive are wired through chain SDKs; Move token standards still need adapters.
Cosmos native send/receive is wired for selected chains; IBC/token modules are not.
Cosmos native send/receive is wired for selected chains; IBC/token modules are not.
Polkadot, Kusama, and Bittensor native send/receive are wired through Substrate SDKs.
Listed for discovery, but real transaction support needs a production signer/indexer adapter.

Stacks native STX and selected EVM BTC L2 networks are wired; non-EVM Bitcoin L2s still need adapters.
